name: fwdays-ai-sre
postStartCommand: sudo service docker start 2>/dev/null || true && ([ -f kubeconfig-kind.yaml ] && (KUBECONFIG=kubeconfig-kind.yaml kubectl port-forward svc/kagent-ui -n kagent 8081:8080 &) && (KUBECONFIG=kubeconfig-kind.yaml kubectl port-forward svc/agentgateway-proxy -n agentgateway-system 8080:8080 &) || true) && echo 'Run: make dev-up'
